name: @types/react-dom
usage_summary: react-dom is actively used: createPortal from 'react-dom' in ui-extensions-dev-console/Modal.tsx; createRoot from 'react-dom/client' in ui-extensions-dev-console/main.tsx; renderToStaticMarkup from 'react-dom/server' in app graphiql templates. react-dom@19.2.4 does not ship its own .d.ts files.
how_to_remove: Not removable while react-dom is used. react-dom does not bundle its own types. @types/react-dom must be retained in all three packages.
replacement_reason: react-dom is used for DOM rendering and server-side rendering in app and ui-extensions-dev-console. It does not bundle type declarations.
